channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: TWO WEEKS — 9 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
TWO WEEKS

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-04-07 22:39 UTC

OP

I have just been informed we are being granted two weeks . Nothing will happen for two weeks. Pump it.

Early replies (first 3)

62088070
is this the final TACO?

62088083
>>62088008
JUST KILL THEM ALL ALREADY SO MY BAGS CAN MOON AND I CAN STOP WAGING

62088173
>>62088008
yeah kiikes are careing about ceasefire and wont backstab! yeah cool!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62088196
>>62088083
Slay queen

62088210
Its just a request also why is a paki speaking like he's from Britain

62088238
What an absolute farce.

62088264
Told you so

62088889
So obvious. Oil down, markets up.

62088962
2 WEEKS CONFIRMED
YOU HEARD IT HERE FIRST
https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/posts/116365796713313030

item.title: >my dad's business, that'll eventually fall unto me, boils down to micromanaging a bunch of heroin-addled subhuman flunk… — 7 replies — 28.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>my dad's business, that'll eventually fall unto me, boils down to micromanaging a bunch of heroin-addled subhuman flunk…

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-04-07 22:32 UTC

OP

>my dad's business, that'll eventually fall unto me, boils down to micromanaging a bunch of heroin-addled subhuman flunkies EVERY FUCKING DAY!
my old man is pushing 60 and pretty soon its my turn on the big chair, I dont think Im ready enough for this head crusher of a job, his phone rings every other fucking minute or so

Early replies (first 3)

62086511
dont worry your dad will live until 75 at least and blue ball you about your big promotion until hes dead

62086552
>>62086511
Im on the spectrum & Im already doing half of his jobs, any more & I'll just yell as my sole form of communication

62086612
>>62086497
just sell to private equity, invest in a diversified portfolio and do whatever the fuck you want with your life.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62086732
>>62086552
They're junkies anon, they deal with the stress of you yelling at them by doing drugs.

62087303
>>62086497
Drywall?
Or landscaping?

What's the business?

62087369
>>62086497
Cool you can replace them all with white men that don't drink or drug.

62088910
>>62087303
we own warehouses then rent them to other businesses, mostly big retail
>>62087369
no wypipo here in singapoor

item.title: BTC can't hold 70k for one single day---nobody speaks of a bullrun anymore. — 6 replies — 24.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
BTC can't hold 70k for one single day---nobody speaks of a bullrun anymore.

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-04-07 22:26 UTC

OP

BTC can't hold 70k for one single day---nobody speaks of a bullrun anymore. Should we sell this weak pump ? we all know it's going back to 66k again in a few hours

Early replies (first 3)

62088627
>>62088617
BTC will be holding 150k soon

62088636
>>62088627
Damn I hate these bots, top signal I guess

62088643
>>62088617

Obsessed.

Just buy the asset, anon. You don't have to be a negative little bitch forever.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62088661
>>62088636
>posts bottom signal
>psyopped into your own reverse indicator
Sad!
Many such cases

62088788
>>62088661
Nice try fed but i'm selling.

62088858
>>62088788

> the feds want me to hold bitcoin
> i'm selling

Don't talk about it, be about it.

item.title: ITT say a coin and let KEK make a prediction. — 14 replies — 24.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
ITT say a coin and let KEK make a prediction.

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-04-07 22:04 UTC

OP

ITT say a coin and let KEK make a prediction.

>Green ID - Coin will pump soon
>Red ID - Coin dumps
>Dubs silvered bullrun
>Trips or above golden bullrun for your coin

Note: If anon's follow these signals we will help KEK and create a self fulfilling prophecy

Ill start: BITCOIN

ALL YOU NEED IS BELIEF WAGMI

Early replies (first 3)

62083613
Cry Laughing Token (LMAO)

62083635
>>62083613
>>62083490
JUST WENT ALL IN WAGMI

62083641
>>62083490
APU

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62083652
>>62083641
Oh no

62083655
Jasmy

62083676
>>62083655
dubs.. not bad.. yellow id.. hmm
>>62083641
damn bro.. thanks a lot

and for mine i'll say HBAR

62083703
>>62083490
I believe in the funny yellow dog
Give it to me straight, kek: how will doge fare?

62083709
>>62083676
That’s gold anon not yellow

62083891
Fat Chud

62083975
PBR

62084598
PAAL

62088344
>>62083975
Sad

62088348
>>62083613
>>62083635
Just bought
>>62083641
>>62083703
>>62083975
It's over

62088729
>>62083490
Monero

item.title: I'm a 29 year old NEET with $150k in crypto/stocks and have zero skills. — 5 replies — 20.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
I'm a 29 year old NEET with $150k in crypto/stocks and have zero skills.

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-04-07 22:38 UTC

OP

I'm a 29 year old NEET with $150k in crypto/stocks and have zero skills.

My parents are threatening to kick me out unless I "do something".
What do I do? I was supposed to be a millionaire by now.
Do I go to school at this age? Start a business or something?

Early replies (first 3)

62088631
>>62088610
Tell your parents they are full of shit and don't have the balls to kick you out of the house. They'll stop to threaten you immediatly once you call their bluff

62088634
>>62088610
I'm 29 and I make more than that a year

62088662
>>62088610
Yeah i startend going to uni at that age, but that's because i was already on benefits and uni is being paid by the state. Pretty comfy income. Just make dure you live within a 20 minute commute. Housing crisis over here made me not able to, and it's fucked.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62088792
Want a real answer? Take the $150k and put it in a savings account that gives you 4% that's $6000/year for free. Tell your parents your working some tech job and pay them $300 a month in rent. This will be life changing for them and buy you years of losing thousands living on your own. Take the $200 extra each month, cut your hair, buy a dress shirt, clean your ass and go do shit for people in your church or friends or neighbors. Simple shit like getting groceries or painting a wall, not because it will get you money, but it will get you the "job connection" from one of the people you help. Think of it as good guy nepotism.

62088958
>>62088610
damn ur doing good 150k is a lot. Just enroll in university and take out loans + financial aid.

check total eth cex supply!

does this mean when the bull market is back on ETH is going to the fucking moon???

62088785

62083963

i keked hard at your picrel ngl senpai
pisschads stay winning

item.title: Is 44k a year from VA disability enough for to focus on getting a wife? — 2 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is 44k a year from VA disability enough for to focus on getting a wife?

Open thread • Replies: 2 • Updated: 2026-04-07 22:31 UTC

OP

Is 44k a year from VA disability enough for to focus on getting a wife? Like she'd need a job herself but I dont want to work and I dont know what to do with all my neetbuxx. Im thinking of just focusing on neetbuxx and getting a sugar mommy.

Early replies (first 3)

62088483
>>62088230
>Is 44k a year from VA disability enough for to focus on getting a wife?

of course.

$44K va disability is better than $120K from waging.

but if you 'focus' on getting a wife, then you're a creepy incel and you won't get one.

>asian mil scammer stephen stan clemente lives in massillon ohio usa.

62088895
>>62088483
>but if you 'focus' on getting a wife, then you're a creepy incel and you won't get one.
If you don't "focus" on getting a wife, you'll die alone and unloved.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

$1 wen?
(Hopefully this month desu)

62082403

62085911

62088704

drains LTC price thanks to merge mining.

item.title: Can someone explain why americans and zionists are so perverse that they have no qualms in using fake news during A WAR… — 3 replies — 7.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Can someone explain why americans and zionists are so perverse that they have no qualms in using fake news during A WAR…

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-04-07 22:15 UTC

OP

Can someone explain why americans and zionists are so perverse that they have no qualms in using fake news during A WAR to manipulate markets?

Even the negotiations are fake. Iran never agreed to have Pakistan as mediator.

Early replies (first 3)

62088687
>>62088655
Everything else, even the calls to invoke the 25th amendment, are pure bread and circuses. Both parties want to destroy Iran.

Why are americans like this?

62088716
>>62088687
>Why are americans like this?
Is it even a question?
>Smol hats

62088789
>>62088716
>it's da joos bro
You amerifats are a bunch of greedy fuckers and are always blaming someone else. Even now, the generals Trump fired are blaming the jews, while Hegseth keeps pushing for the war and Trump and his family keep manipulating the market.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 269 replies — 193.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 269 • Updated: 2026-04-07 21:16 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62075463
100$ end of bull run

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62077075
Every day after the 30th day I get 150 DOT as a bonus. If we keep the thread alive for 30 more days I'll get 30 * 150 = 4500 more DOT. Please help contribute so my village of Mumbai gets feed.

62078039
>>62077075
You are not in India

62078216
>>62078039
This is my hand >>62008295 young Vishnu. This was taken directly from Mumbai, the city of DOT.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62078593
Dont selling my dotty anymore

62078595
75

62078631
Depressing thread

62078789
>>62078216
Fake

62079572
>>62078631
Well, I've already got my 11.5k DOT that Gaving promised me and every day this thread stay alive I get an additional 150DOT. Doesn't really seem depressing to me

>>62078593
>>62078595
100$ END OF BULL RUN

>>62078789
I am brown as chocolate itself. I am a true Mumbai warrior

Thank you for keeping the thread alive my Mumbai warriors. You are feeding your village. This is a cooperative effort. The mumbai boys strike AGAIN


Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62079598
This is the most damaging thread for dot in history

62079614
>>62079598
Read this >>62069282. We're playing this whole board. They're eating right out of our hands. First we make them believe that DOT is held by the GLAMOROUS citizens of Mumbai. Then at the same time we pocket the money from Gavin Wood for keeping the thread alive. AND at the same time we SHORT IT TO 0$. The whole city of Mumbai is in on it. INDIA SUPER POWER BY 2020 wasn't a lie. It's a FACT for 6 years already.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62079649
>>62079614
But is the tech good?

62079750
>>62079649
Literally THE BEST chain currently. And no, I'm not just making shit up. It literally does what everyone else is trying to do. Once JAM + NOMT hit it'll be able to do MILLIONS of TPS (not just value tx) while doing continous compute, while being 100% decentalized, while the tx will be CHEAP, while having NATIVE interoperability, while being able to control other chains and never leave DOT, ... This projects is THE project and people are still buying meme coins. It's UNFATHOMABLE.

62080914
I hope you guys smell the bottom. I can smell the bottom of the Vishnu mindchain. I hope you're going in HARD and DEEP. I hope you guys are PENETRATING THE BOTTOM of the market. I hope you're bouncing up and down on that bottom. I hope you're eating that bottom out and scooping it up. Mmmm, that delicious Vishnu bottom. It has a great taste inside my mouth. I hope you guys are enjoying it as much as I am. I'll leave some cream for you so it tastes even better.

62080937
>>62079649
DOT is literally the most superior blockchain out there. Everything that other people promise and don't deliver DOT already has. Everything that other people lie about and can't do DOT can do. The really BIG upgrade we're waiting on is JAM and NOMT this year
Read more here >>62026407 and >>62056612 and >>62056570. NOMT + JAM scale the network to more a few million or maybe 10-20m TPS. We currently have the highest recorded TPS on a live network (https://data.parity.io/spammening). 143.3k TPS on a live network (NOT TEST NET BULLSHITERY like the other chains are showcasing). This was done one 23 of the 100 cores that are available. So this was only 23% of the full capacity. Some cores are already sold to other chains therefore we can't do a full test. But you can guesstimate the numbers, right? And since the last spammening the throughput has gone up. We could now probably do like 250k TPS from 23 cores or something like that. Just look at the "Performance Charts" on the page I linked. The fees were literally almost always below 0.05$. The fees were around 0.03 to 0.015$ even when the network handled 140k TPS. Do you remember how Solana halted the network literally 8x due to it being congested and shit like that? That can't happen on DOT. The average finality was 16.58s. The thing is though, we'll soon be getting 500ms blocks. When the tests were conducted the block times were still 12s? Now they're 6s and soon they'll be 500ms (Basti blocks). A lot is happening on DOT this year!
Also if you look at the stats the network has been growing over time https://data.parity.io/parachain-stats?selection-mode=include&frequency=daily

62080949
>>62079649
Also combine that with the new tokenomics and the long term vision for the project... I really don't see this project becoming irrelevant to be honest. It simply JUST FUCKING DOES WHAT IT'S SUPPOSED TO DO. The other L2s are behind and they won't catch up ever in my opinion. Once JAM hits DOT will be AT LEAST 5 to 10 years ahead of all the major L2s and L1s. It's not even comparable to be honest. People are blind to not see it. Sooner or later people will wake up and realize "OMG, I've been a degenerate memecoin gambler while I could buy the Vishnu of the blockchain".
Simply put, this project does what others promise and don't deliver. DOT has already DELIVERED and is DELIVERING even more amazing things that no other chain has and if they do they don't package it like DOT does. Sure ICP has continous compute, but does it have native interoperability and can host L2s and smart contracts and has 500ms block times and is decentralized and has shared security to his L2s and has the best governance system in crypto and has over a few million TPS and has ... and has ... Bro, it's fucking impossible to beat DOT on technical superiority. Some day people will realize that they can't build a new use case on the other chains. That they're LIMITING THEMSELVES by staying on shit like ARB or POL or some other fucking shit like that. A few months back Polkadot Asset Hub launched and people can simply copy paste EVM code to DOT and it'll work. We're currently waiting for this referendum (https://polkadot.polkassembly.io/referenda/1864) to pass in order for Uniswap and Safe to launch on Asset Hub. Other major projects will probably follow. Should pass any day now. Slow and steady wins the race

62081930
>>62079750
>>62080914
>>62080937
>>62080949

Why should we believe some one from India

62082053
>>62081930
Truth is not to be believed. Truth is to be seen. Just try the chain out. And look at the data. I've provided you with plenty of evidence. You SHOULD NOT believe me. The essence of crypto is what? DYOR. Do Your Own Research. We really did forget our roots, didn't we?

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62082374
>>62081930
I actually applaud you to be honest. Anon, I'm proud of you. Thank you for having CRITICAL thinking. We need more people like you. And again DYOR and you WILL come to similar if not EXACTLY THE SAME conclusions. I dare you, I double dare you, I triple dare you.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62084668
100$ end of bull run

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62085029
75.
y2029

62085250
>>62026429
imagine being really hard to develop on, because your system uses a particularly confusing superset of rust, and then scrambling to make an EVM to attract more developers. no sympathy for rust faggots.

62086293
>>62085250
>because your system uses a particularly confusing superset of rust
Help me understand what you mean by
>a particularly confusing superset of rust
Rust is a programming language, sure. And how would one use a particular subset of it? Like what exactly do you mean by that?

62086622
>>62085250
Even if you just google "Does polkadot use a subset of rust or rust?"
It'll say "
Polkadot uses Rust—specifically, modern, full-featured Rust—rather than a restricted subset of the language.
Polkadot is built on the Substrate framework, which is designed from the ground up in Rust to ensure memory safety and high performance, critical for blockchain infrastructure.
"
So, I have no clue where you're getting your information from. The thing is I'm a programmer and what you said seems so akward. You're basically trying to imply that you can take just a subset of the functionality of Rust. A "confusing" subset of a programming language. Like what? You only take the else statement without the if? Can you elaborate? I guess you probably can't because either you're spreading FUD or you've been manipulated into something that isn't real.

62087253
>>61932834
Not even Larp Davis shills this gay little coin anymore.

62087258
>>61948998
>We've got a true nazi over here.
See? Nobody cares.

62087587
>>62087253
>>62087258
So, what's your point exactly? Thank you for the bump

62087811
>>62087587
My point is, Lark Davis has forsaken you. It's ogre.

62088494
>>62087811
Ok, that's great you informed us. And so what's your point again? I still don't see it.

62088504
>>62087811
Like, how does that do anything for me or anyone? Like what's your point in regard to how that affects DOT? Or anything? I really don't see a connection

item.title: There are NO jobs left — 65 replies — 78.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
There are NO jobs left

Open thread • Replies: 65 • Updated: 2026-04-07 21:50 UTC

OP

> 8 in 10 jobs posted online are FAKE
> those 2 in 10 jobs that aren't fake are all looking for either a buddy, family member, internal, senior level, or a literal unicorn for their positions

It's truly the end times now, isn't it?

Early replies (first 3)

62084288
Now you see why war is necessary. That will create a ton of jobs that you can do.

62084296
>>62084281
There's plenty of jobs it just the wages won't go up. I quit my shitty QC job and got another one a week later.

62084378
>>62084281
yeah there literally arent.. all these companies keep firing tens of thousands of people and we barely create any jobs

even dog shit mcwage jobs are impossible to get. Before covid you put in 10 applications and got a 3 stage interview into offer. Now its all fucked up

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62086190
>>62086103
t. Nigel Ngubu Hamzaoui from South Kensington

62086392
If you haven't applied at least 300 times, you need to shut up about there but being any jobs.

Grow up man. Turn off the video games, stop doing scrolling and do the work.

62086407
>>62086392
no

62086437
>>62084281
Took me almost 2 years to get a new job and I have extensive credentials in a serious tech specialty. It's grim.

62086453
>>62084427
It was that way around D.C. and Arlington even 15 years ago. You couldn't order food half the time because the bitch working drive thru would just laugh at you for speaking English.

62086454
>>62086437
just take a shower incel

62086643
>>62085050
based

62087110
>>62084288
prob true

62087172
>>62084281
>>62084288
>>62084622
get a TS/SCI security clearance (they don't fuck around with fake postings) and get paid $125K to sit in a mailroom nobody uses.

62087181
>>62086437
Crazy how at the same time, the most rabid normie will tell you it's easy and you just gotta apply and climb the corporate ladder. Oh and if you don't like being exploited like cattle? Don't worry, just quit and look for a better company/boss/team! You're still going to be treated like shit, except they'll be just nice enough so that they can antagonize you if you dare speak up.

62087197
>>62084281
>It's truly the end times now, isn't it?
yes.

62087207
>>62087172
>just let the government literally probe your asshole and be subject to random drug screenings, continuous surveillence and FBI(r) Background Checks(tm) continuously for a job worse than anything commercial.
if you're such a fucking loser, than ya, go for it. but having to report to the government just because you go to shitaly or some shit is fucking dumb, and again, they are watching you continuously with their Palantir bullshit spyware.

62087227
>>62087172
Bro I have secret clearance and it doesn’t do shit desu

62087240
>>62087227
grim.

62087281
>>62084281
Steps:
1) Get a job
2) Sell all your crypto and get a money market fund at 4% per year.
Poor people shouldn't buy crypto!!!!

62087291
>>62084281
>It's truly the end times now, isn't it?
So when people declared "the end times" for the past 10+ years, what were you doing?
There's no jobs, no houses, no white people, no fucking anything.

62087377
>>62084281
White harder.

62087528
>>62084281
Stop using sites like Indeed, they keep up closed positions to pump their application numbers. There will be less fake postings on the companies' websites.

62087560
>>62087227
is there any way to get one that doesn't involve getting it sponsored by a company? i want one and meet the baseline requirements but haven't gotten any job that would sponsor it yet

62087590
>>62084394
fucking lady won't answer the phone at my doctor's office I don't know if she's Asian or Latina I think she's a hybrid
Would/10 tho if I ever get in there and get her alone and don't hnnnnnggh

62087707
>>62087172
>get a TS/SCI security clearance
Well obviously do this if you can but if it was easy everyone would and the jobs wouldn't pay so much.

62087766
>>62087227
Going from secret to TS/SCI instantly moved me from $85k a year to $140k a year and that was literally 16 years ago. If I still had a TS/SCI I'd make $225k a year easily at an easy job where I'd take 2 hour gym lunch breaks every day and work out with literal Navy Seals like I used to.

62087805
cleared world was funny, so many people did literally nothing all day and got paid six figure salaries with top tier benefits. ur in a windowless office day with no phone so it kinda blows though

62087955
>>62087766
Yea but to get TS u need a justification and that means generally a managerial role or principal role

62088163
>>62087805
I don't know how these people mentally cope with their own existence. The idea of willingly going to work every day for years and contributing absolutely nothing is just insane to me. I used to be in that world too, even as an "executive level" (junior manager), and I couldn't bear it. So I quit and now I'm happily doing the job of 5 people.

I often dream of working on one of those big projects full of competent people like the Manhattan project, cracking Enigma, or anything in early NASA. I know I have the skills for it, but I don't think those projects exist any more. The world has become so enshittified that everyone's just trying to keep their head down and avoid attention.

62088237
>>62088163
I could never figure it out myself, there were sometimes weeks were there was nothing to do but everyone had to show up for 8 hours and pretend to be busy with stuff. Soul sucking... Only lasted a few years, tried both civ/con roles. Skills regressed heavily. Glad you found something meaningful. It would be amazing to work on a project like that, but yeah most people just want the paycheck and to keep their head down.

62088559
>>62087207

>Get spied on by Palantir for free

>Get spied on by Palantir and by Caren in HR while you work at Nabisco company for $45,000 and get fired

>Get spied on by Palantir and your federal agency in a do-nothing comfy ClearanceJob for $200,000

Hmmmmmmmm

>inb4 "But weed, dude!"

62088598
>>62087955
>Yea but to get TS u need a justification and that means generally a managerial role or principal role
Nah just go for places like DIA, NRO, NGA where all employees get TS/SCI, even the janitors.

62088633
>>62084387
Gold

62088645
>>62085265
They're not slaves, they're conquerors.

item.title: Financially Fucked By My Father — 57 replies — 63.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Financially Fucked By My Father

Open thread • Replies: 57 • Updated: 2026-04-07 21:45 UTC

OP

My dad has no life insurance. Still owes $75k on the mortgage with 8 years to go. He only has $5k in the bank and $5k in his 401k at 63 years old.

He doesn't do ANY maintenance on the house. The basement hasn't had a dehumidifier in it for 7 years and it's full of rat shit and probably mold. The roof is overdue by 2 years and it'll cost about $20k for a new roof. Water collects around the foundation of the house when it rains and he doesn't do anything about it. The water filters need to be changed twice a month, but he only does it once a month, so there's rust in both bathrooms. The master bathroom bathtub drain leaks into the basement and he hasn't fixed it in 4 years, so he just showers in the other bathroom. The kitchen sink leaks water. The fridge is brown from dirt and grime. The stove is covered in dirt and grime. The microwave above the stove is broken, so he has a separate microwave on the counter. The carpet is 20 years old and destroyed. The laminate flooring is peeling away. The window sills are bubbled and peeled from water damage. The furnace is 20 years old. The garage has no electricity running to it and the garage door is broken. He doesn't even fix that when he used to install and repair garage doors as a job for 30 years. There are cobwebs in the living areas. The porches are falling apart and it's a tripping hazard every time you walk up the stairs.

All he does is get drunk, jackoff to porn, blast music and mow the lawn.

Having a parent that is lazy, financially retarded and unhygienic will screw you over when it comes to owning and maintaining a home. I refuse to put $100k into the house to make it enjoyable to live in, especially when he's still living there.

My mom is awesome though and she lives with me.

Are you in the same situation, or did you get lucky enough to have intelligent, hardworking parents that actually care about your future finances?

Early replies (first 3)

62078756
>>62078722
so sound like a faggot

62078808
>insure house alot
>fire
>profit

62078820
>>62078722
Not really seeing how your dad's financial issues affect you at all though, much less how you are "financially fucked" by this.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62081248
>>62078722
Why don't you help him fix important stuff on the house? One day It'll be yours.

62081353
>>62078942
Stop bitching, my aunt stole my entire inheritance and ran it into the ground/spent it before our lawsuit could get a judgement. I feel bad for my dad but he was able to build everything back for himself and taught me how to make money by making me do it myself just like his dad. If you’re upset enough that it bothers you just know that making money is easy but it’s very slow. You may think $100 here and there is beneath you but if you scale it right after making that 1,000 times you are onto something. Then it compounds and grows from there and eventually it’s $500 a pop before you know it. I would sell things in bulk, or flip things. And I’m talking anything you can get cheap. I did coins, antiques, and furniture first, now I’m doing properties. It’s basically the same business model as selling drugs but you have to factor in taxes and shipping/misc expenses.

62081399
>>62078722
Did be at least buy you a home before fucking you?

62081401
>>62078854
The only thing more based is he wrenched on classic cars and played Quake 3

62081408
arent mutts houses made of plywood?

so this house is worthless anyway, just destroy it and sell the land when he dies

fucking faggot

62081418
My boomers parent are just hard wired to scam me into living the ideal real life.

62081433
>>62080252
Life in prison/10

62081434
>>62080727
Based!

62081439
>>62081248
He doesn't do any maintenance and I don't live there. Even if I did the basement, foundation and roof (which are the current priorities) he wouldn't maintain any of it. I'd rather just invest the cash in a brokerage and have liquidity instead of dumping into an asset where I can't access it unless I sell the property. And on average, only 70% of the cash used to renovate and repair a home goes into the equity of the house, at least according to the interest. So, if you dump $100k into repairing and renovating a home, you'll only increase the equity by about $70k.

62081480
>>62078968
yeah, i can tell you got kicked out of your parents house at 18 and actually bought their excuse huh? sorry your parents don't love you anon, that really sucks.

My parents are currently restoring their house for generational use when they die, fancy new backyard and everything.

62081481
>>62079915
my mum never took anything for her schizo until she had a total breakdown in her early 60s, now she's a bit of a zombie on the drugs, she was 'okay' prior to all that, but yeah. It sucks, hope your friend can keep it together long term.

Stay away from vaccines.

62081523
>>62081481
Thank you man.

62081603
>>62078968
good slave, abandon all familial ties and be the perfect atomic consumer labor unit

62081615
>>62081353
lmao bruh i'm not even mad about it
shit just is what it is, happens a lot

62081637
HAHAHAH OH ACTUALLY WOW
How can you be so fucking entitled to say your father fucked YOU over?

I have always have the mindset that I will get nothing from my parents and will have to make whatever I want myself
They only way your parents fucked you over was to raise you to be such a fucking prick that assumes he need mommy or daddys money to even live a decent life

62081660
>>62078722
Similar father here OP

>gets made redundant from civil service role (how i have no idea)
>spends it all on trip to NY with my sister (fuck me and my mum i suppose)
>Tries to claim unemployment benifits
>Mother is working so he is entitled to fuck all
>"Ugh they wont give me a thing"
>does nothing
>sleeps 15 hours a day
>wants to "fix" the garden
>Asks me for money then never does anything
>"Yeah i never got around to getting the stuff"
>Me and mother work constantly to keep house going
>ive sank thousands into a new heating system, paying bills, fixing shit etc

I want to move out but i feel bad just abandoning everyone, the place WILL go to shit big time if i stop paying bills and generally doing what my fucking father SHOULD be doing

62081724
>>62081439
The issue is that water damage starts slow and manageable, but if not addressed it will completely destroy things for good. spending 5k on repairs now might save you 100k in just 5 years. Mold/erosion/water damage is absolute "house cancer" and you want to get rid of it fast!

62081758
>>62081660
your father clearly has depression and no motivation to fix his life. He must feel no purpose at all. Maybe if you or your sister had children he'd have something to do.

>>62081724
i think his dads house is at the point where simply bulldozing it and building another is the better option. Its america, they make their homes out of duct tape and plywood, it doesnt really matter. My small unit has full internal copper water and gas piping though, so thats not an option for me.

62081778
>>62081637
I'm in the top 7% of wealth for people my age. You people read WAY more into a post than what is actually there. That being said, leaving your only-child a home that's falling apart and still has $75k of debt (currently) on top of that is peak financial stupidity and a sign of complete laziness. It's not entitlement driving the irritation, it's the fact my father chooses to live this way and when that home is passed down you're left with the choice of paying off the remaining debt + spending over $100k repairing and renovating the property, or selling the property and losing the land entirely.

I don't understand how YOU don't understand the problem with this. Of course, you could just be trolling out of boredom.

>>62081724
It's way more than $5k already to fix the basement. It's already at $10k - $15k.

>>62081758
I've thought about that too and just keeping the land (3.5 acres). It's a modular double-wide ranch home. It's basically just a cheap doublewide trailer on top of a basement. 1,600 sqft.

62081783
>>62081758
>Can barely afford to keep this shithole going
>Bro just have a bunch of kids

62081790
>>62078722
You literally are a fat retard.

62081964
>>62078722
>All he does is get drunk, jackoff to porn, blast music and mow the lawn
Giga based. That{s my plan for the next 25 years. Your father has already seen the end of times and heard the echo of Nut's womb and saw that all is vanity.
t. 40 years old fag

62081991
>>62081408
Its OSB, not even plywood anymore. But little OP's dad is trailer trash, there's no reason to even maintain the house because it's worthless but dumbass OP doesn't realize this. Homebaggies really are retarded.

62082141
>>62078722
>All he does is get drunk, jackoff to porn, blast music and mow the lawn.
>Having a parent that is lazy, financially retarded and unhygienic will screw you over
Have some of his habits been installed in you?

62082730
>>62078722
You don't seem to give a shit about your father since you show no concern for his clearly poor mental state. He is likely severely depressed and just waiting to die but rather than thinking about how you can help him your only concern is that he isn't going to leave you a big payday when he croaks. So it seems to me that you will be getting exactly what you deserve. Nothing.

62082791
>>62082730
>I know the family dynamic between a father, his wife, his son and the rest of his family based on a few paragraphs about his poor financial decisions and lifestyle.

This is like blaming the family of a homeless junkie after they attempted to help him multiple times, take him to rehab and save him from himself.

62083742
>>62078722
>The furnace is 20 years old
I once rented a house with a 34 year old furnace. Not like olden immortal boiler or something, forced air natty has with an electric blower. 34 years. I found out the landlord didn't want to replace it as it would mean converting to a high efficiency unit as the old 80% units aren't legal to install here anymore. The high efficiency unit install was going to run upwards of 10k as there was no simple way to install the new pvc flue. Needless to say I did not stay there long. I found out when there was an ignition issue, which he had fixed, then curiously insisted on installing carbon monoxide detectors in every room.

62083898
at least you have one parent that owns some sort of house, even if its some shitty trailer. You don't have to act like you have this giant burden hanging over you. Just sell the turd and wash your hands of it. You're not complaining about inheriting a free house, are you? I wish I could say the same about my dad. He's in his 60s and owns nothing, not even a shitty trailer.

62084981
>>62083742
Good thing you got out of there. Wtf.

>>62083898
I like the land, the street and the town it's in. It's just the house is a total piece of shit and an eyesore, simply because of poor decision after poor decision. Trying to communicate anything to him is like trying to communicate to a toddler.

62088630
>>62084981

But it's still a manufactured home, whether it's in good shape or not. That being said, there's always something a house needs fixed when it's time to change hands. So your options are to take these repairs on yourself after he croaks and move in, or sell it as is. You must really like that house and location to be willing to consider moving there with all that's wrong with it. Most people that inherit a house with that many problems just sell it. Find something you like better and put the money towards that. And for what it's worth, I would try and not worry about the house. It sounds like your dad is starting to lose his mind slowly, as do most people in their later years. It probably won't get better and there's nothing you can do to fix it. It's better to accept the situation for what it is rather than stress out about how you're going to get through to your elderly dad to stop fucking up his house. It's gonna happen no matter how much you try to intervene. Once your dad passes away and the smoke clears, that's when it's time to worry about this stuff.

item.title: >HE BOUGHT FUCKING OIL — 15 replies — 41.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
>HE BOUGHT FUCKING OIL

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-04-07 22:17 UTC

OP

>HE BOUGHT FUCKING OIL

Early replies (first 3)

62087549
>>62087540
LUBRICANT?

62087618
Seems to be the most jewish asset on teh planet desu senpai. Physical barrels are going for $150 a barrel now, but the niggers in charge of the prices are only pricing it at $70 a barrel for the next few months??

So if you question it, people say the strait will be opened and everything will be fine, but at this point tons of petrochemical plants are getting blown up left and right. Its not even about the strait anymore....but for some reason the price doesn't really take off like it should.

62087841
>>62087540
BABY OIL DIDDY BLUD

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62087921
>>62087618
It could be the market pricing in covid style lockdowns to reduce consumption.

62087922
>>62087618
The trick is that there is no such thing as a free market and there never will be.

62087932
>>62087540
Better than dog coins

62087936
>>62087922
Sure, but if you're underpricing a real physical thing, you're going to have to start rationing it. Also you're probably going to see a black market form if the right measures aren't taken.

62087973
>>62087540
if you got in on it early in the fiasco then good for you. buying now? you must be nuts when the hormuz is barely a fraction of a percent of commerce. they'll have to make paper oil cheap again eventually.

62088130
>>62087540
I've owned oil for 6 years. Get on my fucking level.

62088140
>>62087540
Shut the fuck up you moron. It's going to $200 whether you like it or not.

62088605
>>62087540
>bought USOY at the literal pico-top
>signs of taco tonight with rumours of ceasefire
I guess I will be averaging down. There's no way oil doesn't reach $200 this year
>>62087973
It's not barely a fraction. Jet fuel price skyrocketed already and 7% of all worldwide planned flights were canceled as of now. This is just the beginning.

62088619
Oil will keep going up at least until Trump gets on TV with tears on his face and begs Iran to open the strait. That's the bare minimum. He'll probably have to suck a donkey before this is all over with.

62088625
>>62087540
And made 20k in the last month thru leaps and selling shorts KEKAROOOO

62088778
"USOY" nigger what the fuck are you doing, buy futures like a functional human being

62088805
kek oil baggies

item.title: any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management… — 29 replies — 37.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management…

Open thread • Replies: 29 • Updated: 2026-04-07 21:53 UTC

OP

any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job
I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management experience but im not getting any offers on my applications
Should I get some cyber security certs? which ones should I focus on if yes?

Early replies (first 3)

62084718
Funny of you to ask OP, I remember my struggles of landing my first WFH job. Btw, WFH stands for Work from Home because not many people come across that term usually. But, if you must ask, our company is headquartered in Nashville. My base pay is 95k per year along with a COL stipend and generous health and pension benefits. As we speak, I am clocked into my position in the beautiful hot springs in British Columbia. We do have an RTO policy, but I haven't been to the office in 4 years! Ha-Ha! You COULDN'T pay me to work in the office. Yesterday I had fun fucking a uni student that transferred from china for the school years, so yeah life is great so far. Today she is making me her traditional Chinese dinner as a thank you for fucking her so nicely. Maybe next month I'll fly out to Holland and do my job for the month. But like I said OP, keep your chin up and don't be disuaded by the multiple rejection emails in your future until you get that golden offer. Take it and run with it. Anyways .... Chiao!

62084729
>>62084718
thanks for the response anon
Did you use indeed or pay for a website that specializes in WFH jobs like flexjobs etc? I'm wondering if indeed is just all scams at this point and if it might be worth it to pay a job finding website to filter the garbage

62084746
There are no jobs anymore. 200,000 people have been laid off in the last six months while job creation is negative. 90% of job openings go to immigrants anyway.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62084747
>>62084729
Mainly family connections.

62084759
>>62084746
>no more jobs
They hire new people every day faggot. Go post your demoralization shit somewhere else

62084791
>>62084746
yeah, I guess i'll just keep shitposting about the epstein files on /x/ until something works out

62084803
>>62084678
WFH is common in the technical writing field

62084965
>>62084718
Holy comfy
GIWTWM

62085002
>>62084678
so many green id’s in this thread
good sign op

62085269
>>62084791
best to give up and just hate on glowies by posting things they hate like Epstein
your inability to find a job is a sign to make their lives miserable or else they would make sure you found work

62085740
Demoralizers are right. Your best bet is to make a YouTube channel going over the Epstein files. That shit is huge now. Everyone here should be doing 4chan schizo shit on social media because everything we’ve been talking about, banker greed, Epstein abuse, conspiracy, ww3 apocalypse is now becoming mainstream. Most of you saw this coming. Time to capitalize on it

62085750
>>62085740
>Demoralizers are right about there being no more normie jobs

62085875
>>62084678
>Should I get some cyber security certs? which ones should I focus on if yes?
No, because literally every retard like you has decided that cybersecurity is a comfy do-nothing job and EVERYONE has flooded the industry. There were not enough cyber security jobs 10 years ago, there sure aren't enough today now that it has been meme'd as retard daycare.

62085899
>>62084678
Honestly data analytics is an easy WFH career path. Just learn SQL and either PBI, Tableau, or Qlik depending on what company you want to work for. Maybe some python would be good too, but I got a job a few years ago basically only knowing SQL and making a follow along tutorial Tableau dashboard.

62085904
>>62085875
Exactly this. OP should focus their attention on destroying glowfucks and not something that only neckbeard redditors want to do. Cybersecurity was always fake and for fags

62086811
>>62084759
>They hire new people every day faggot
yeah in hyderabad

62086826
>>62084746
Why you call them “immigrants” man? Those are not immigrants, those are pure turdies in turdworld
It’s called off sourcing

62087064
>>62084678
green id get

62087137
>>62084678
got it years ago

62087226
>>62085899
Thank you anon. Sounds like a plan, I am currently learning Python, is SQL hard to learn?
So basically I should look for jobs as Data Analyst, can I try to apply even without any experience in the field? I have been working as a development engineer since 7 years and looking to change careers into 100% WFH.

62087308
>>62087226
SQL is definitely easier than python. If you’re not a complete retard it shouldn’t take too long to become proficient. And yeah you can apply without any experience, data analyst is usually an entry level role. Just find some datasets online and make some dashboards that look nice and say you know SQL, that was enough for me to get a job. It’s not a bad career path because you can transition into data engineering pretty easily from data analyst and data engineers can make a lot of money at the right companies.

62087410
>>62084678
Why are you people still keeping the belief that wfh jobs are attainable alive? Its a complete scam, especially now.

>>62085904
>>62085875
This is right
>t. Fell for the cyber security meme because I thought I would be able to wfh

3 years later and I never got a job in the field let alone a wfh one. I fell for the scam. Don't do what I did.

62088425
>>62085875
I lucked into one of those roles and it sucked (apart from having ok pay and being WFH)
I'm sure people can succeed in that role but it's one of those roles where there's an autistic degree of variance in terms of responsibility and buy-in from the rest of the org, to most orgs it's just a cost center that gets in the way of productivity

62088526
>>62084678
I got laid off from my last job in March 2025. I was WFH, thanks to covid we all went WFH. 9 years at the company and genuinely the top guy. I was team lead, I did the training, I wrote the manuals, I had the highest numbers. I worked in fraud prevention for ecomm. I went to meetings with the big dogs while my manager who knew less about our programs stayed with the rest of the team. I loved my bosses. They loved me. I got laid off after training 10 Filipinos. So did the rest of our NA Fraud team and our manager. Replaced by the Flips. I job hunted with good references and great resume. I only got 2 interviews in 6 months, finally landed a shitty call center job. Had to take it because I needed work.

No one is hiring WFH unless you're something special or have certs others cant easily get. Why pay you 20+/hr when they can hire a flip for 2.50/hr. You can do more work? Okay, I can hire 4 flips and its still less than hiring you. If not flips, indians.

62088548
>>62084678
I'm going back to school for cyber security. What certs do you recommend? I have a security clearance which I hope gets me an entry level job at least

62088565
>>62084678
I was in my job for 8 years then Covid hit and we all just went home permanently. There was a 2 year period where we weren’t sure if we were going to come back to the office or not, but finally they said we were permanently remote.

62088593
>>62084678
I took an internship straight out of college (2018) which turned into a software dev job. Am senior dev now. We went fully remote during covid and have been ever since

62088599
>>62088526
This kind of disloyalty should be punishable by public hanging

62088666
>>62088599
yup I agree. my boss' hands were tied, he is still there, the flips are dogshit and theyve had to hire even more to try and cover all the work the American team was doing. They have a flip manager too. Not a single American on the entire ecomm fraud team. Bossman says its only a matter of time until the entire company is flips. I don't have anything against the flips, some of them were really cool. And it's not like they caused me to get laid off. Its the greedy Indian CEO who caused it. And Id much rather hear a Pilipino accent than an Indian accent if I ever had to call in to speak to customer service.
